positive: A maximalist, stylized vintage botanical pattern featuring various forms of glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, jungle foliage, and delicate vine work. The composition should be highly detailed and symmetrically arranged, creating a repeating tile pattern suitable for apparel print. Utilize a deep jewel-toned color palette of sapphire blue, emerald green, and pops of glowing neon coral and lavender. The style must be a blend of Art Nouveau and psychedelic folk illustration, with strong, crisp linework and visible cross-hatching texture. The central subject should be a cluster of ornate, glowing flora. Excellent contrast against a slightly muted, creamy ivory background. Highly clean, vector-like quality with a slight ethereal glow effect.
negative: blurry, out of focus, low detail, artifacts, noise, grainy, text, words, watermark, logo, signature, poor composition, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts
